structured_items.title: OpenAI expands Codex availability beyond the ChatGPT sidebar
structured_items.summary: OpenAI described new ways for developers to work with Codex from more places in their workflow.
key_points: OpenAI described new ways for developers to work with Codex from more places in their workflow.
structured_items.importance_rationale: Codex 扩展到更多开发工作流表面，提升开发者智能体采用关注度。
structured_items.risk_rationale: 材料未显示安全、合规或交付方面的突出风险。
structured_items.opportunity_rationale: 开发者工作流扩展强化了编码智能体的采用机会。
evidence: OpenAI said Codex can support software development tasks across more surfaces

structured_items.title: OpenAI and Dell Technologies partner to bring Codex to enterprise environments
structured_items.summary: OpenAI and Dell announced a partnership aimed at bringing Codex into hybrid and on-premises enterprise environments.
key_points: The partnership signals enterprise demand for coding agents.
structured_items.importance_rationale: OpenAI 与 Dell 合作面向企业环境，产业部署信号明确。
structured_items.risk_rationale: 材料提到安全部署需求，但未显示已发生的严重风险事件。
structured_items.opportunity_rationale: 企业环境部署信号强化了编码智能体商业化机会。
evidence: The partnership signals enterprise demand for coding agents

trend_insight.title: AI Agents adoption signal is broadening
trend_insight.summary: AI Agents appears in multiple current items, with developer workflow and enterprise deployment signals.

ai agents.title: Previous AI agent workflow update
ai agents.importance_rationale: 历史事件显示智能体工作流已有持续关注价值。
ai agents.risk_rationale: 历史材料未显示突出风险。
ai agents.opportunity_rationale: 历史材料显示开发者工作流采用机会较强。
